descriptions.storage: Export and automatic backups of your library database

wordCount.label: Word Count
wordCount.description: Show word count in the editor footer

updates.title: Updates
updates.availableDescription: A new version of Storyteller is available.

channel.label: Update channel
channel.description: Choose Stable for regular releases, or Beta to receive pre-release versions

updates.upToDateDescription: You're running the latest version of Storyteller

export.label: Export database
export.description: Save a copy of your entire Storyteller database as a single SQLite file.
export.unavailable: Export is not available in this environment

backup.label: Automatic backups
backup.description: Periodically copy your database to a folder.

backupNow.label: Backup now
backupNow.unavailable: Backup is not available in this environment

interval.label: Backup interval
interval.description: How often to save while the app is running.

retention.label: Backups to keep
retention.description: Oldest files are deleted before creating the next scheduled backup when there are more than this many.

footer.openSource: Storyteller is open source software under GPLv3 license
